info.description: Caching proxy between the Street Fighter 6 Buckler API and PostgreSQL. Serves cached battlelog data instantly and syncs with SF6 asynchronously in the background.
info.title: neo-shadaloo API

get.description: Returns the cached battlelog from the database. If the cache is stale (>5 min), a background sync with the SF6 API is triggered without blocking the response. If no data exists yet, an empty replay list is returned and sync is triggered.
Returns battles grouped by calendar day (YYYY-MM-DD) and by weekday (0=Sun..6=Sat).
get.summary: Get calendar heatmap data for a user
Get most recent LP and rank per character for a user

get.description: Returns win/loss counts grouped by hour of day (0–23) for a heatmap chart.
get.summary: Get hourly win-rate heatmap for a user

get.description: Returns daily LP values (last match per day) sorted oldest-first, for plotting an LP progression chart.
get.summary: Get LP evolution history for a user

get.description: Returns stats grouped by opponent character, sorted by total battles descending. Includes priority score for training recommendations.
get.summary: Get per-opponent-character stats for a user

get.description: Returns only the fighter banner info from the cached battlelog. Lighter alternative to the full battlelog endpoint.
get.summary: Get profile/banner info for a user

get.description: Returns a paginated list of replays from the cached battlelog. Triggers a background sync if the cache is stale. Query params: page (default 1), limit (default 20, max 100).
get.summary: Get paginated replays for a user

get.description: Returns aggregated win/loss statistics computed from the cached battlelog.
get.summary: Get win/loss stats for a user

post.description: Triggers an immediate background sync with the SF6 API for the given user, regardless of cache freshness. Returns 202 immediately; the sync runs asynchronously and notifies connected WebSocket clients when complete.

get.description: Upgrades the connection to WebSocket. The server sends a JSON message `{"type":"update","cachedAt":<ms>}` whenever a sync completes for this user. The client should re-fetch `/v1/battlelog/{userId}` on receipt. A ping is sent every 30 seconds to keep the connection alive.
Returns 200 if the server is running.

post.description: Faz o crawl de todas as páginas dos 4 rankings (league, arcade, kudos, master) em background. Snapshot atual — substitui dados anteriores.
post.summary: Dispara sync de todos os rankings globais

get.summary: Vizinhança de uma posição no ranking
Posição de um jogador no ranking
Estado de sync de um ranking

post.summary: Dispara sync de um ranking específico

get.description: Returns YYYYMM periods that have cached usage data, sorted newest-first.
Returns cached character usage rates (usagerate_list) for the given YYYYMM period. Triggers a background sync if missing or stale (>24h).
get.summary: Get character usage rates for a given month

post.description: Triggers an immediate background sync with the SF6 API for the given YYYYMM period. Returns 202 immediately.
post.summary: Force a usage data sync for a given month

full_data.description: JSON completo do entry (para campos não-extraídos)

last_synced_at.description: quando o último sync COMPLETOU com sucesso
